lines.speaker: Zahur
lines.text: Hi there. Do you need anything? I can clean herbs for a fee of 200 coins per herb. I can clean all of your herbs at once, or I can do individual herbs if you show them to me.

lines.speaker: Zahur
lines.text: I can also decant your potion vials to into different doses. That service is free so long as you have the empty vials needed. If not, it's just a few coins.

lines.speaker: Zahur
lines.text: Hello again. Do you need anything?

lines.speaker: Zahur
lines.text: I didn't find anything that I could clean.

lines.speaker: Zahur
lines.text: I don't think you've got anything that I can decant.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why would I pay for you to clean herbs?

lines.speaker: Zahur
lines.text: Many of my customers wish to sell the herbs which they can't clean to other adventurers. They might hope for a better price by doing this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's that kid outside your shop?

lines.speaker: Zahur
lines.text: I do not know where he came from. He came to Nardah recently, and said his business might help my customers, so I let him have some space out there.

lines.speaker: Zahur
lines.text: He seems very lost in the world, but I hope his work will be a success for him.

lines.speaker: Zahur
lines.text: Now, would you like me to clean your herbs or combine your potions?
